title: Conversation Message
description: Represents a message in a conversation with properties for identification, content, timing, and user information. This interface defines the structure for individual messages within a conversation component.

props.name: sendTime
props.description: Timestamp when the message was sent, or null if not yet sent.

props.name: deliverTime
props.description: Timestamp when the message was delivered to the recipient.

props.name: readTime
props.description: Timestamp when the message was read by the recipient.

props.name: replyTo
props.description: Reference to the message this message is replying to, if applicable.

props.name: content
props.description: The actual content of the message, which can vary based on the message type.

props.name: fromId
props.description: Identifier of the user who sent the message.

props.name: name
props.description: Display name of the message sender.

props.name: onResendClick
props.description: Callback function called when the resend button is clicked for a failed message.

props.name: onDeleteClick
props.description: Callback function called when the delete button is clicked for the message.

props.name: onDownloadClick
props.description: Callback function called when the download button is clicked for file messages.

props.name: onCancelClick
props.description: Callback function called when the cancel button is clicked for ongoing operations.

props.name: showActionButton
props.description: Controls whether action buttons (resend, delete, etc.) are shown for this message.

props.name: userName
props.description: Additional user name information for the message sender.
